languages.text: "Будь благословлен каждый ваш шаг, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}! Мы сейчас же начнем сборы и через оборот совершим исход на поверхность, дабы приветствовать наш новый дом!"

traits.locale_text: "Будь благословлен каждый ваш шаг, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}! Мы сейчас же начнем сборы и через оборот совершим исход на поверхность, дабы приветствовать наш новый дом!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "May your every step be blessed, o Heavenly Envoy! We will begin preparations immediately and ascend to the surface in one rotation so that we can welcome our new home!"
languages.original_text: "Будь благословлен каждый ваш шаг, о {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}! Мы сейчас же начнем сборы и через оборот совершим исход на поверхность, дабы приветствовать наш новый дом!"

traits.locale_text: "May your every step be blessed, o Heavenly Envoy! We will begin preparations immediately and ascend to the surface in one rotation so that we can welcome our new home!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "May your every step be blessed, o Heavenly Envoy! We will begin preparations immediately and ascend to the surface in one rotation so that we can welcome our new home!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "May your every step be blessed, o Heavenly Envoy! We will begin preparations immediately and ascend to the surface in one rotation so that we can welcome our new home!"
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Möge jeder deiner Schritte gesegnet sein, o himmlischer Gesandter! Wir werden sofort mit den Vorbereitungen beginnen und in einem Umlauf an die Oberfläche aufsteigen, damit wir unsere neue Heimat willkommen heißen können!"
languages.original_text: "May your every step be blessed, o Heavenly Envoy! We will begin preparations immediately and ascend to the surface in one rotation so that we can welcome our new home!"

languages.text: "Que chacun de vos pas soit béni, ô Envoyé céleste ! Nous allons commencer les préparatifs immédiatement et remonter à la surface en une seule rotation afin d'accueillir notre nouveau foyer !"
languages.original_text: "May your every step be blessed, o Heavenly Envoy! We will begin preparations immediately and ascend to the surface in one rotation so that we can welcome our new home!"

languages.text: "愿你的每一步都得到祝福，天国使者啊！我们将立即开始准备工作，并在一次旋转中升至地面，以迎接我们的新家园！"
languages.original_text: "May your every step be blessed, o Heavenly Envoy! We will begin preparations immediately and ascend to the surface in one rotation so that we can welcome our new home!"

languages.text: "¡Que cada uno de tus pasos sea bendecido, oh Enviado Celestial! Comenzaremos los preparativos inmediatamente y ascenderemos a la superficie en una rotación para poder dar la bienvenida a nuestro nuevo hogar!"
languages.original_text: "May your every step be blessed, o Heavenly Envoy! We will begin preparations immediately and ascend to the surface in one rotation so that we can welcome our new home!"

languages.text: 「天の使者よ、あなたの一歩一歩が祝福されますように！直ちに準備を開始し、一回転して地上に上がり、新しい故郷を迎えることができますように！"
languages.original_text: "May your every step be blessed, o Heavenly Envoy! We will begin preparations immediately and ascend to the surface in one rotation so that we can welcome our new home!"

languages.text: "Her adımınız kutlu olsun, ey Cennet Elçisi! Hazırlıklara hemen başlayacağız ve yeni evimize hoş geldin diyebilmek için bir rotasyonda yüzeye çıkacağız!"
languages.original_text: "May your every step be blessed, o Heavenly Envoy! We will begin preparations immediately and ascend to the surface in one rotation so that we can welcome our new home!"
